wordPairs.explanation: 'Kitten' is simply a young 'cat' — their meanings are almost identical, so their embedding vectors sit extremely close together.
Both describe a positive emotional state and appear in nearly identical contexts, so the AI places them very close.
Not synonyms, but deeply connected — doctors work in hospitals. The AI learns their strong contextual link.
Surprising! Because 'Apple' is also a major tech company, the AI learns this connection — one word, two meanings.
These words constantly appear together in food discussions, creating a strong associative link even though one is a noun and one an adjective.
